client_goals: good daylight and low-energy passive design

data_quality.message: Site boundary was supplied by the request.

climate_projection_refs: UKCP18 reference required before production use

rationale: Peak summer altitude 61.89° at 51.54158°N — high overhead sun favours external shading on south-facing glass.
Peak winter altitude 15.02° — orient occupied rooms to south to capture low-angle gain.
Avoid uncontrolled west glazing to limit late-afternoon overheating risk.

key_drivers: summer-solstice peak altitude 61.89° exceeds 55° — south/west glazing requires shading

passive_design_moves: Orient main occupied rooms toward controlled daylight.
Use opening strategy and shading as geometry constraints, not caption-only claims.

material_weathering_notes: Select robust UK external materials and detail exposed edges for rain.

precheck_results.title: Approved Document K — stair geometry between storeys
precheck_results.summary: 1 stair element(s) connect the programmed levels; pitch and rise/going to be verified at Stage 3.
precheck_results.recommended_action: At Stage 3, confirm rise (≤220 mm domestic / ≤190 mm public), going (≥220 mm), and pitch (≤42° / ≤38°).

precheck_results.title: Approved Document K — guarding to falls
precheck_results.summary: Guarding heights, balustrade design, and infill spacing depend on detailed elevations not yet present at this stage.
precheck_results.recommended_action: At Stage 4 verify: 900 mm minimum (domestic stair), 1100 mm minimum (balcony / public landing), 100 mm sphere infill rule.

precheck_results.title: Approved Document K — stair headroom
precheck_results.summary: Headroom over stairs requires the soffit profile from the level above, which is not yet detailed in the ProjectGraph.
precheck_results.recommended_action: Verify 2.0 m minimum headroom along the entire flight at Stage 3 spatial coordination.

precheck_results.title: Approved Document L: Conservation of fuel and power
precheck_results.summary: Approved Document L requires consultant review at this stage; no automated rule evaluation is configured.
precheck_results.recommended_action: Engage a qualified consultant to evaluate against Approved Document L: Conservation of fuel and power.

precheck_results.title: Approved Document M — door clear width
precheck_results.summary: All 8 door(s) meet the AD M minimum clear-width pre-check.
precheck_results.recommended_action: No action — AD M door-width pre-check satisfied.

precheck_results.title: Approved Document M — accessible WC presence
Approved Document M — principal accessible entrance
precheck_results.summary: No door tagged as a main entrance was found; AD M requires a clearly identified accessible principal entrance.
precheck_results.recommended_action: Tag the principal accessible entrance and confirm a level threshold and approach.

precheck_results.title: Approved Document M — vertical access between storeys
precheck_results.summary: 1 stair element(s) provide vertical access; AD M Category 2/3 dwellings or non-domestic buildings may also require a passenger lift.
precheck_results.recommended_action: Confirm whether a lift is required by AD M (Category 2/3 dwellings or non-domestic) and add to the model if so.
